action_or_policy: Biddeford, Maine, fatal shooting involving an ICE agent
litigation_posture: Reported incident; the State and Federal investigative scope evidence-access posture and complete pre-stop factual basis are not yet established in the public record.
source_family: Official State statement Associated Press reporting and Maine statutes
revisit_trigger: Official incident record; State or Federal investigative-jurisdiction decision; public evidence-disclosure decision; charging or declination decision; judicial ruling bearing on investigative access Federal-officer immunity or the stop basis; or a material DHS or ICE vehicle-stop policy change.
notes: DOM-005 owns post-incident evidence access. HOR-045 owns the prospective vehicle-stop authority safeguards and reporting question. Neither route treats an initial account as an adjudicated finding or presumes illegality.

action_or_policy: Texas critical-incident comparison: Martinez evidence record and Salgado Araujo investigative access
litigation_posture: The Martinez grand-jury no-bill was reported; the Houston incident's public evidence and investigative-access posture remains developing.
revisit_trigger: Official Texas Rangers or prosecutor record clarifying the Martinez evidence path; official Houston investigative, identification, or evidence-access record; charging or declination decision; or judicial ruling bearing on access or immunity.
notes: Use the Texas records as constrained comparators. Delayed public disclosure, state investigative access, and the legality of force remain analytically distinct questions.

action_or_policy: First use of the Alien Terrorist Removal Court in 2026-TRC-1
litigation_posture: Initial sealed application remains under judicial consideration; the court ordered a supplemental factual and legal submission by July 22 2026; no application approval or public removal hearing is shown on the official case page.
source_family: official ATRC docket and U.S. Code
revisit_trigger: Government supplement; application approval or denial; public removal hearing; notice or unclassified-summary ruling; counsel or special-attorney appointment; detention or release ruling; public merits order; appellate filing or decision; dismissal or withdrawal.
notes: Primary monitoring home is HOR-037 while the candidate remains unadmitted. RIGHTS-002 is the affected existing-proposal route. The nearly blank public cover sheet is a political-accountability consequence of the sealed statutory process, not evidence that the sealed application itself was blank or technically noncompliant.
